items.title: The Legal Strategy Behind Crypto Exchange Backpack's Token-to-Equity Program
items.whyYouShouldCare: Backpack's token-to-equity program could set a precedent for regulatory compliance in crypto, impacting investor confidence and market dynamics.

items.title: Hyperliquid's HYPE token jumps 5% as Iran war brings windfall revenue, JUP gains on supply freeze
items.whyYouShouldCare: Hyperliquid's revenue boost from geopolitical events highlights the volatility in crypto markets, which may influence liquidity and trading strategies for SOL.

items.title: Jupiter surges 17% after rebound – Traders still bet on JUP’s dip
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jupiter's price surge indicates strong market interest, which could enhance liquidity and trading activity within the Solana ecosystem.
